title: dicoma incana
intro: Dicoma incana is a shrub-like plant native to Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Dicoma incana include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, Dicoma incana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in the form of a topical cream or oil for external applications.
